hero.title: The Future of Payments is Here
hero.subtitle: Accept payments globally with our secure, fast, and reliable payment processing platform. Built for businesses of all sizes.

features.title: Why Choose EverPay?
features.subtitle: We provide the tools and infrastructure you need to accept payments and grow your business globally.

feature1.title: Global Reach
feature1.description: Accept payments from customers worldwide with support for 150+ currencies and local payment methods.

feature2.title: Advanced Security
feature2.description: Bank-level security with PCI DSS compliance, fraud detection, and real-time monitoring.

feature3.title: Developer Friendly
feature3.description: Easy integration with comprehensive APIs, SDKs, and detailed documentation.

partners.title: Trusted Payment Partners
partners.subtitle: We work with the world's leading payment networks and financial institutions.

protection.title: Advanced Fraud Protection
protection.subtitle: Protect your business and customers with our comprehensive security suite.

business.title: Built for Every Business
business.subtitle: From startups to enterprises, we have solutions that scale with your business.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses that trust EverPay for their payment processing needs.

footer.description: EverPay provides secure, reliable payment processing solutions for businesses worldwide.
